ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Dough (60%) (Wheat Flour, Durum Wheat Semolina, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Salt, Flour Enhancer (Wheat Starch, Flour Trearment Agents: Ascorbic Acid, L-Cysteine), Yeast, Dried Barley Malt Extract), Tomato Sauce (18%) (Tomato Pulp, Salt, Dried Oregano, Dried Basil), Flaked Mozzarella Cheese (16%) (Mozzarella (Milk), Rice Flour), Cherry Tomatoes (4%), Grated Hard Cheese (2%) (Cheese (Milk), Anti-Caking Agent: Cellulose)
